always show up at the wrong time? Where

sources.title: THE 6 MONTH EMERGENCY FUND: WHY IT EXISTS AND WHERE TO KEEP IT!!
key_points: Most people who lose their job don't
panic on day one. They panic on day 93.
That's when the severance runs out, when

carousels.concept: Emergency fund math most people get wrong

slides_en.headline: Your emergency fund is a timer.
slides_en.body: Most people don't panic on day one. They panic on day 93.
slides_en.visual_direction: Dramatic cinematic finance image, high contrast, deep navy shadows with warm amber rim light. Sense of countdown and quiet tension.

slides_en.headline: Save expenses, not income.
slides_en.body: Add rent, utilities, food, insurance, minimum debt. Multiply by six. That's your target — not 6x your paycheck.
slides_en.visual_direction: Clean overhead desk scene with notebook and calculator. Warm cream paper, soft shadows, organised and analytical mood.

slides_en.headline: Park it in a high-yield savings account.
slides_en.body: FDIC-insured. Liquid in 1–2 days. Currently paying 4–5%. Checking accounts pay you nothing — that's a tax on laziness.
slides_en.visual_direction: Textural close-up of cash and a ledger. Soft gold accents, quiet authority, the feel of money being organised rather than spent.

slides_en.headline: Stop investing it.
slides_en.body: An index fund averages 8%. Fine — until you get laid off mid-crash and sell at a 30% loss. Your emergency fund is insurance, not an asset.
slides_en.visual_direction: Unexpected pattern interrupt: stacks of cash rendered with cinematic depth. Feels confrontational, slightly off-kilter, the moment of realisation.

slides_en.headline: Automate $50 every payday.
slides_en.body: Set the transfer for the morning your salary lands. Small and consistent beats sporadic and heroic — every time.
slides_en.visual_direction: Laptop open with banking dashboard, cash and coins nearby. A sense of systems running in the background while you sleep.

slides_en.headline: A new phone isn't an emergency.
slides_en.body: The fund is for job loss, medical bills, and broken transmissions. Touch it for anything else and it stops being a safety net.
slides_en.visual_direction: Clean still life: calculator, cash, a pen on paper. Calm, measured, disciplined. The feeling of a line being held.

slides_en.headline: Save this. Start with $20.
slides_en.body: Money explained like math, not morality. Follow @personalfinancetips for one carousel a week.
slides_en.visual_direction: Solid deep navy background, no imagery. Gold CTA block. Quiet, resolved, the ask.

slides_he.headline: קרן החירום שלך היא שעון עצר.
slides_he.body: רוב האנשים לא נלחצים ביום הראשון. הם נלחצים ביום ה־93.
slides_he.visual_direction: Dramatic cinematic finance image, high contrast, deep navy shadows with warm amber rim light. Sense of countdown and quiet tension.

slides_he.headline: תחשב הוצאות, לא משכורת.
slides_he.body: שכירות, חשבונות, אוכל, ביטוחים, מינימום הלוואות. תכפיל ב־6. זה היעד שלך, לא פי 6 מהתלוש.
slides_he.visual_direction: Clean overhead desk scene with notebook and calculator. Warm cream paper, soft shadows, organised and analytical mood.

slides_he.headline: קרן כספית. לא עובר ושב.
slides_he.body: נזילה תוך יום. משלמת היום כ־4%. עובר ושב משלם לך אפס, וזה קנס על עצלנות.
slides_he.visual_direction: Textural close-up of cash and a ledger. Soft gold accents, quiet authority, the feel of money being organised rather than spent.

slides_he.headline: תפסיק להשקיע אותה.
slides_he.body: מדד S&P עושה בממוצע 8% בשנה. נהדר, עד שמפטרים אותך באמצע ירידה של 30% ואתה מוכר בהפסד. קרן חירום היא ביטוח, לא נכס.
slides_he.visual_direction: Unexpected pattern interrupt: stacks of cash rendered with cinematic depth. Feels confrontational, slightly off-kilter, the moment of realisation.

slides_he.headline: הרשאה קבועה של 200 ש״ח.
slides_he.body: תקבע הוראת קבע ליום שהמשכורת נכנסת. קטן ועקבי מנצח גדול וספורדי, כל פעם מחדש.
slides_he.visual_direction: Laptop open with banking dashboard, cash and coins nearby. A sense of systems running in the background while you sleep.

slides_he.headline: אייפון חדש הוא לא חירום.
slides_he.body: הקרן היא לפיטורים, חשבון רפואי, גיר שהתפוצץ. תיגע בה למשהו אחר והיא מפסיקה להיות רשת ביטחון.
slides_he.visual_direction: Clean still life: calculator, cash, a pen on paper. Calm, measured, disciplined. The feeling of a line being held.

slides_he.headline: שמור את זה. תתחיל ב־100 ש״ח.
slides_he.body: כסף מוסבר כמו מתמטיקה, לא כמו מוסר. עקבו ל־@personalfinancetips, קרוסלה אחת בשבוע.
slides_he.visual_direction: Solid deep navy background, no imagery. Gold CTA block. Quiet, resolved, the ask.

carousels.concept: Eight practical steps to build the fund from zero

slides_en.headline: Build a $1,000 buffer in 90 days.
slides_en.body: Five rules. No extreme sacrifice. Save this.
slides_en.visual_direction: High-drama hero shot of stacked cash with warm window light. Aspirational but grounded — this is achievable, not fantasy.

slides_en.headline: Aim for $500 first.
slides_en.body: Don't chase six months on day one. Hit a small number fast. Momentum is the real asset here.
slides_en.visual_direction: Notebook with a simple goal written on it, calculator nearby. Clean, focused, the first brick in the wall.

slides_en.headline: Kill three subscriptions this week.
slides_en.body: Open your bank statement. Circle every recurring charge you forgot existed. That's your first $40 a month.
slides_en.visual_direction: Overhead view of a budget being marked up with a pen. Quiet, deliberate, the sound of cuts being made.

slides_en.headline: Stop saving what's left over.
slides_en.body: If you save after spending, you save nothing. Move the money first. Spend what's left.
slides_en.visual_direction: Conceptual, slightly unexpected image. A moment of inversion — the chart going up, but everything feels reframed.

slides_en.headline: Send every windfall straight to savings.
slides_en.body: Tax refund. Bonus. Birthday cash. Gift from your aunt. It never touches your checking account — it goes to the fund.
slides_en.visual_direction: Cash, a pen, a business chart — the sense of unexpected money being quietly redirected instead of spent.

slides_en.headline: Refill it the month after you use it.
slides_en.body: Emergencies drain the fund. That's its job. But the next paycheck starts rebuilding — no guilt, no pause.
slides_en.visual_direction: Warm scene of cash and a laptop dashboard. The feeling of a tank being topped back up. Steady, unhurried.

slides_en.headline: Save this. Then start tip one.
slides_en.body: Money explained like math, not morality. Follow @personalfinancetips for one carousel a week.
slides_en.visual_direction: Solid deep navy background. Gold CTA button. Calm, clean, the close.

slides_he.headline: 3,000 ש״ח בצד תוך 90 יום.
slides_he.body: חמישה כללים. בלי לוותר על החיים. שמור את זה.
slides_he.visual_direction: High-drama hero shot of stacked cash with warm window light. Aspirational but grounded — this is achievable, not fantasy.

slides_he.headline: תכוון ל־1,500 ש״ח קודם.
slides_he.body: אל תרדוף אחרי שישה חודשים ביום הראשון. תגיע למספר קטן מהר. המומנטום הוא הנכס האמיתי פה.
slides_he.visual_direction: Notebook with a simple goal written on it, calculator nearby. Clean, focused, the first brick in the wall.

slides_he.headline: תבטל שלושה מנויים השבוע.
slides_he.body: תיכנס לאפליקציית הבנק. תסמן כל חיוב חוזר ששכחת ממנו. זה ה־150 ש״ח הראשונים שלך בחודש.
slides_he.visual_direction: Overhead view of a budget being marked up with a pen. Quiet, deliberate, the sound of cuts being made.

slides_he.headline: תפסיק לחסוך ממה שנשאר.
slides_he.body: חוסך אחרי שהוצאת, חוסך אפס. תעביר את הכסף קודם. תוציא ממה שנשאר.
slides_he.visual_direction: Conceptual, slightly unexpected image. A moment of inversion — the chart going up, but everything feels reframed.

slides_he.headline: כל כסף לא צפוי הולך לקרן.
slides_he.body: החזר מס. בונוס. כסף מסבתא. מתנה מחתונה. לא נוגע בעו״ש, ישר לקרן החירום.
slides_he.visual_direction: Cash, a pen, a business chart — the sense of unexpected money being quietly redirected instead of spent.

slides_he.headline: השתמשת? תמלא בחודש הבא.
slides_he.body: חירום מרוקן את הקרן. זה התפקיד שלה. המשכורת הבאה כבר מתחילה לבנות אותה מחדש, בלי אשמה ובלי הפסקה.
slides_he.visual_direction: Warm scene of cash and a laptop dashboard. The feeling of a tank being topped back up. Steady, unhurried.

slides_he.headline: שמור את זה. תתחיל מטיפ ראשון.
slides_he.body: כסף מוסבר כמו מתמטיקה, לא כמו מוסר. עקבו ל־@personalfinancetips, קרוסלה אחת בשבוע.
slides_he.visual_direction: Solid deep navy background. Gold CTA button. Calm, clean, the close.

recommendations_for_dashboard.rendering_notes: Fonts: Fraunces+Inter (EN), Frank Ruhl Libre+Assistant (HE). Canvas 1080x1350 portrait.
recommendations_for_dashboard.next_carousels_run_suggestion: Run the counter-frame on debt: 'Why paying off your credit card beats building an emergency fund' — the 19% vs 5% spread almost nobody calculates.
